Home page/About/Terms of Service

Terms of Service

Used to describe the basic boundaries for quotations, documentation, production, delivery, changes and after-sales communication. Before the official launch, it is recommended to review it with the legal department based on the actual contract text.

quote boundaryDocumentation ResponsibilitiesChange CancelAfter-sales support
quoteFileDeliveryAfter-sales

Quotes and Orders

The page display, online estimate or preliminary communication are only used as a reference for demand assessment. The official price, delivery date and service scope shall be subject to the quotation, order or contract confirmed by both parties.

Documentation and Design Responsibilities

The client shall ensure that the uploaded documents, drawings, material requirements and usage descriptions are true, complete and have the right to use them. The impact caused by missing data or version errors should be confirmed in a timely manner during project communication.

Production and delivery

The production cycle is affected by materials, processes, inspection, quantity, post-processing and logistics. When expedited, partial delivery or special packaging is involved, this should be made clear before order confirmation.

Changes, cancellations and after-sales

After the project enters production, changes or cancellations may incur incurred costs. After-sales processing should be based on drawings, acceptance standards, inspection records and confirmation information from both parties.
